algorithms.kmeans: K-Means clustering in RGB color space. Groups pixels into k clusters and returns cluster centers. Best for finding the mathematically dominant colors.
algorithms.mediancut: Median Cut quantization. Recursively splits the color volume along its longest axis at the median. Preserves the natural distribution of the color space.
algorithms.histogram: HSL histogram with peak detection and merging. Quantizes into perceptual HSL bins, finds population peaks, and merges similar colors. Best for capturing how humans perceive the image.
